meaning: adj.最低的,最底下的,最小的
examples: He admits to having hit the lowest point in his life.
We do have the lowest level of inflation for some years.
The pound has sunk to its lowest recorded level against the dollar.
Packard believes that process control begins with employees making decisions quickly and at the lowest levels.
Stormont Security Minister, Jane Kennedy, called the Derry attack "the lowest form of bullying".
